  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    DataStorage
    Handles reading and writing workout data to the file system.
    InputFormPanel
    The left-hand View component: a form where the user enters the details of a single workout and presses "Add Workout".
    Intensity
    Represents the intensity level of a workout.
    InvalidInputException
    Thrown when the user provides invalid input when adding a workout.
    Main
    Entry point of the WorkoutLog application.
    MainWindow
    The main application window of WorkoutLog — the controller of the MVC design.
    ToolBarListener
    Listens for the file actions triggered from the toolbar.
    Workout
    Represents a single workout entry in the WorkoutLog application.
    WorkoutFormEvent
    Carries the data the user entered in the input form when the "Add Workout" button is pressed.
    WorkoutFormListener
    Listens for the "add workout" action coming from the input form panel.
    WorkoutListListener
    Listens for the "delete workout" action coming from the workout list panel.
    WorkoutListPanel
    The right-hand View component: shows the list of all logged workouts and a statistics summary below it, plus a button to delete the selected workout.
    WorkoutLog
    Manages the list of all recorded workouts.
    WorkoutToolBar
    The toolbar with quick-access file buttons (Save, Load, Export).
